source_filing: Walmart Inc. Form 10-K (fiscal year ended January 31, 2026)
original_text: Our total revenues increased $32.2 billion or 4.7% and $32.9 billion or 5.1% for fiscal 2026 and 2025, respectively, when compared to the previous fiscal year.
modified_text: Walmart reported that total revenues increased $32.2 billion or 6.7% for fiscal 2026 when compared to the previous fiscal year.
claim: Walmart's total revenues increased $32.2 billion or 6.7% for fiscal 2026 versus the prior year.
citation_as_written: Walmart Inc. Form 10-K (fiscal year ended January 31, 2026), Management's Discussion and Analysis
notes: Sharp pattern: the source pairs '$32.2 billion' with '4.7%'. The dollar figure is left intact while the percentage is altered from 4.7% to 6.7%, creating an internal inconsistency since $32.2B on the prior base equals ~4.7%, not 6.7%.
